RimHeroes.HeroClassDef.label: fighter
RimHeroes.HeroClassDef.description: A master of martial combat. Holds the line while others break.

RimHeroes.HeroClassDef.label: wizard
RimHeroes.HeroClassDef.description: A scholar of the arcane. Fragile, studious, and capable of erasing a raid before it closes the distance.

RimHeroes.HeroClassDef.label: cleric
RimHeroes.HeroClassDef.description: A conduit of the divine. Mends the broken - and, when the need is great, calls the dead back.

RimHeroes.HeroClassDef.label: druid
RimHeroes.HeroClassDef.description: A voice of the wild. Wears the shapes of beasts and commands the green.
